description:
cloudstack_static_route

Creates a static route for the given private gateway or VPC.

argument_reference.name: cidr
argument_reference.description: The CIDR for the static route. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: gateway_id
argument_reference.description: The ID of the Private gateway. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

attributes_reference.name: id
attributes_reference.description: The ID of the static route.
